description.overview: A rare Japanese breed known for their distinctive brindle coat. Kai Ken are devoted to their families but reserved with strangers, making them excellent watchdogs.
description.history: The Kai Ken originated in Japan.
description.temperament: Known for being intelligent, loyal, reserved.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their medium-length double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A rare Japanese breed known for their distinctive brindle coat. Kai Ken are devoted to their families but reserved with strangers, making them excellent watchdogs.
